title: AI Models
description: Select a transcription model or download additional models. All processing happens on your device.
deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? You can download it again later.
insufficientSpace: Not enough storage to download this model. Need {{required}}, {{available}} available. Free up space and try again.
emptySessionsMessage: Hit the record button to start transcribing
incognitoExplainerBody: Transcribe without saving. This session won't be stored or synced anywhere.
spokenLanguageDescription: Choose which language the model should detect. For best results, select the language you mainly speak.
microphoneAccessRequiredMessageAndroid: Echos needs access to your microphone to record audio. Please grant permission to continue.
microphoneAccessDeniedMessage: You have permanently denied microphone access. Please enable it in Settings to use recording features.
smartSplitDescription: Automatically splits long recordings into separate items at natural pauses. Turn off to keep each recording as one item.
keyboardPromptBody: Transcribe directly inside any app, privately. Messages, emails, notes. Wherever you type.
keyboardPromptIosDisclaimer: In Settings, tap Keyboards → Add New Keyboard → Echos. No Full Access required.
advancedSettingsAddKeyboardDescription: Use the Echos keyboard in any app to transcribe while typing.
